completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 2 logical parts: excalidraw-app (web), packages/* (libraries); primary stack TypeScript/React/Vite/Yarn workspaces.
Inventoried README, CONTRIBUTING, dev-docs, .github; user_context none.
Tech stack from root and workspace package.json manifests; Node >=18, React 19, Vitest, ESLint, Prettier.
Quick scan: pattern-only; no REST API surface in repo; integrations via Firebase, socket.io-client, Sentry; client persistence (idb-keyval) inferred from dependencies.
Annotated source tree written to source-tree-analysis.md
Dev commands from root package.json; CI workflows under .github/workflows
Workspace consumption: excalidraw-app builds against linked @excalidraw/* packages; integration-architecture.md
project-overview, development-guide, component-inventory, deployment-guide, contribution-guide, api-contracts-excalidraw-app, data-models-excalidraw-app
Validation pass: quick-scan scope; checklist not executed (no automated doc linter).

findings.project_classification: Yarn workspaces monorepo: excalidraw-app (host PWA) + packages (excalidraw, common, element, math, utils) + examples
findings.technology_stack: TypeScript, React 19, Vite 5, Vitest, Jotai (app), custom actionManager state in core editor (see .cursor/rules/architecture.mdc)
